query:
ALTER TABLE `orders`
  ADD COLUMN `cancellationReason` text,
  ADD COLUMN `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `cancelledBy` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `archivedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `archivedBy` int NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('pending','assigned','picked_up','in_transit','delivered','failed','returned','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 21qwqa3fGSy7fki.cc8701c17183 --database 96zJ69HnhoCcXrCsRpdDxD --execute ALTER TABLE `orders`
  ADD COLUMN `cancellationReason` text,
  ADD COLUMN `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `cancelledBy` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `archivedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `archivedBy` int NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('pending','assigned','picked_up','in_transit','delivered','failed','returned','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
